suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update auth bootstrap guidance to remove JWT token login wording and describe session-cookie bootstrap flow consistently.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Re-run review of fix-session-secret-fallback still found AGENTS.md saying login returns JWT while Session Cookie Auth Migration guidance documents cookie sessions.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten implementation-worker procedure compliance/reporting around TDD ordering and accurate followedProcedure signaling.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Fix review observed implementation edits landed before tests while handoff compliance remained marked true; this pattern also appeared in prior session-auth reviews.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit guidance to avoid reading `.env` files or exposing secrets in tool outputs/transcripts unless strictly necessary.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Fix feature transcript includes a read of packages/server/.env that surfaced environment values; current guidance warns against committing secrets but not transcript exposure.
